sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42037" key="e(ptoro/guios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑπτ-ορόγυιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (ὄργυιἀ</foreign> <sense id="n42037.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seven fathoms long,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πόδες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">98</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
